plugins.name: pkb
plugins.description: LLM-compiled knowledge base. Commands: /pkb (natural language router + init/status), /pkb:ingest, /pkb:ingest-collection, /pkb:collect, /pkb:inventory, /pkb:dataset, /pkb:archive, /pkb:compile, /pkb:query (quick/standard/deep/--resume), /pkb:research (5-10 parallel agents, --new-topic, --min-time, --mode thesis), /pkb:audit, /pkb:librarian, /pkb:refresh, /pkb:assess, /pkb:plan, /pkb:doctor, /pkb:output, /pkb:retract, /pkb:project, /pkb:ll.
